'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=eRNL5_HJm6E_z.9EOVFS9Q8VUrbUWA1jvTV54k9Py3E-1772897761-1.0.1.1-QQa_D3i94B.17PGvhpHpAmPVgUCQRRPoSZpM9MPHjsQ"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
